trigger_reason: step 13 FIRED for R808; step 13.5 v11 adversarial attack triggered.

step_13_spec_pre_check_input.rationale: Min-plus FFN replaces standard ReLU+linear with tropical min-plus operations; the FFN computes y = min_i (W_i x + b_i) instead of softmax-attention. Tropical semiring structure distinct from baseline real-valued addition.

attacks.claim: Tropical min-plus FFN, at training initialization, is dominated by one branch (the minimum) and becomes equivalent to a single linear-layer baseline; under weight decay the other branches asymptotically vanish, collapsing to a single branch.
attacks.evidence: Min-plus is non-differentiable at the argmin boundary; gradients flow only through the active branch; standard training causes the active branch to absorb all gradient updates, collapsing the tropical structure to a single-branch linear layer (equivalent to baseline).
attacks.rebuttal_attempted: Soft-min relaxation (log-sum-exp at low temperature) maintains multi-branch flow.
attacks.rebuttal_outcome: Counter-rebuttal: log-sum-exp at low temperature is equivalent to softmax+linear (no longer tropical); the architectural-distinguishability claim collapses to softmax+linear which IS the baseline.

attacks.claim: 3-seed paired t-test on LRA Pathfinder/WMT16 has ~50% power
attacks.evidence: Standard power calculation; LRA std approx 0.8 percentage points

attacks.claim: Tropical attention from R770 retrofit already showed tropical semiring distinguishability; min-plus FFN does not add new architecture.

rationale: R808 Min-plus FFN: post-attack distinguishability FALSE (load-bearing attack succeeded; architectural claim does not survive convergence dynamics).
v14_step_14_input_signal: post_attack=false; step 10 verdict (from 10_decision.json) = FAIL with total_hits=1; step 14 will detect COHERENT (both axes agree on FAIL) -> SKIPPED_COHERENT
